abstract: Comprehensive PHP 8.3+ best practices guide designed for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 33+ rules across 7 categories, prioritized by impact from critical (strict types, modern features) to medium (performance optimizations). Each rule includes detailed explanations, real-world examples comparing incorrect vs. correct implementations, and specific rationale to guide automated refactoring and code generation. Covers type system, modern PHP 8.x features, PSR standards, SOLID principles, error handling, performance, and security.

categories.name: Type System
categories.description: Strict types, property types, return types, union/intersection types, never/void

categories.name: Modern PHP Features
categories.description: Enums, readonly, constructor promotion, match, named arguments, nullsafe operator

categories.name: PSR Standards
categories.description: PSR-4 autoloading, PSR-12 coding style, file structure, naming conventions

categories.name: SOLID Principles
categories.description: SRP, OCP, LSP, ISP, DIP — object-oriented design principles

keyFeatures: Strict types declaration on every file
Modern PHP 8.3+ syntax (enums, readonly, constructor promotion, match)
PSR-4 autoloading and PSR-12 coding style
Union and intersection types for precise type safety
